EMAIL & SMS FOR PROFESSIONALS
Connect with clients, expand your list, and grow your business

reviews across
EMAIL MARKETING FOR CONTENT CREATORS
Grow your list, learn about your audience, and drive more ROI

reviews across
Recommended for your business
Customize my experience
See what’s working at a glance
Take the guesswork out of your marketing. Mailchimp makes it easy to measure the impact of every send.
Explore analytics and reporting
Personalize every interaction
Unlock the power of your customer data to fuel growth with tools that make segmentation easy.
Get to know your audience
Grow your contact list
Gather contact info and essential customer data with easy-to-build popup forms and embedded forms.
Discover popup forms
Switching is as easy as 1, 2, 3
Easily transfer your contact list and assets with dedicated onboarding support and migration tools.
Check out migration tools
Reach more customers with SMS
Boost results and use integrated SMS to reach your audience with the right message on the right device.
Learn about SMS marketing
Discover new ways to drive sales
Use AI-powered tools to create effective, targeted emails that turn shoppers into buyers.
Learn about driving sales
Send high-quality content with ease
With our drag-and-drop builder, AI-powered tools, and 300+ beautiful templates, designing emails is a breeze.
See our content creation tools
Save time on repetitive tasks
Use always-on automations to help drive revenue with less attention from you and your team.
Check out marketing automations
Discover 300+ integrations
Mailchimp seamlessly connects to the apps and platforms your business already uses.
Visit the integrations directory
Count on award-winning support
Every paid Mailchimp plan includes 24/7 live chat and email support. We’re here to help—around the clock.
See support options
See pricing
Make Mailchimp
work for you
Got a second to answer a couple questions? We can
personalize your visit
with the info that matters most to you and your business.

Select
Retail & e‑commerce
Hospitality, dining, events, etc.

Other
What are the top 3 things you want to achieve?
Select up to 3

No thank you
Customize my experience
Marketing that delivers results
For 24 years, Mailchimp has helped millions of businesses get more opens, clicks, and sales.
97% more clicks
Customers saw up to 97% higher click rates when they used both email & SMS.*
See up to 30x ROI
E-commerce businesses see up to 30x ROI* using Mailchimp’s Standard Plan.
99% delivery rate
Customers experience 99.99% transactional email delivery rates.*
Use powerful AI tools
Our customers have sent over 9.8 billion emails with AI-generated content.*
Get started easily with a personalized product tour
An onboarding specialist is here to help you get started with confidence—it’s included with Standard and Premium plans.*
Learn more about onboarding

Non-USD Pricing:
Actual price may vary. Prices displayed are estimates based on current exchange rates. Exact amount charged will vary and depends on the exchange rate at the time of payment processing. Prices displayed excl

Cookie Preferences
Mailchimp Assistant
Where can I see Mailchimp's email templates?
How does Mailchimp help grow my business?
Why do we use cookies and other tracking technologies?
Essential Website Cookies
Performance and Functionality Cookies
Analytics and Customization Cookies
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
Why do we use cookies and other tracking technologies?
We use first-party and third-party cookies for several reasons. Some cookies are required for technical reasons in order for our Mailchimp Sites and Service to operate, and we refer to these as “essential” or “strictly necessary” cookies. Other cookies enable us and the third parties we work with to track and target the interests of Visitors to our Mailchimp Sites, and we refer to these as “performance” or “functionality” cookies. For example, we use cookies to tailor content and information that we may send or display to you and otherwise personalize your experience while interacting with our Mailchimp Sites and to otherwise improve the functionality of the Service we provide. We may use cookies to keep customers signed into their Mailchimp account for 30 days, unless they manually log out, so that they don’t have to enter their username and password every time they visit. We also enable our Members to deploy cookies and similar tracking technologies in connection with their use of our Service in order to allow our Members to track their Contacts or end users. Finally, third parties serve cookies through our Mailchimp Sites and Service for advertising, analytics, and other purposes. This is described in more detail below.
More information
Essential Website Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with the services and features available through our site. Because these cookies are strictly necessary to deliver the site, you cannot refuse them without impacting how the site functions.
View Cookies
Performance and Functionality Cookies
Performance and Functionality Cookies
These cookies are used to customize the functionality and performance of the site to enhance your experience. If toggled off, certain functionalities such as personalization and video would become unavailable, though if you’ve checked “keep me logged in”,  you’ll still be signed into your account for 30 days until you log out. See our Cookie Policy for more information.
View Cookies
Analytics and Customization Cookies
Analytics and Customization Cookies
These cookies collect information to help us understand how the site is being used or how effective our marketing campaigns are. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and to see how visitors move around the site. These cookies may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our pages.
View Cookies
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
These cookies are used to make advertising messages more relevant to you and your interests. They also perform functions like preventing the same ad from continuously reappearing, ensuring that ads are properly displayed, and in some cases selecting advertisements that are based on your interests.
View Cookies

analysis.name: Mailchimp
analysis.tagline: Email & SMS marketing minus the learning curve.
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered email and SMS marketing platform that drives revenue through automations, analytics, and audience data for SMBs and e-commerce businesses.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small-to-mid-sized e-commerce retailers, small businesses, non-profits, content creators, and professional services firms who need an all-in-one marketing platform without deep technical expertise.

features.name: email marketing
features.description: Core campaign creation and sending for newsletters, promotions, and one-off blasts.

features.name: sms marketing
features.description: SMS campaign creation and sending alongside email campaigns.

features.name: ai marketing tools
features.description: AI-powered suggestions and automation across campaign creation, audience targeting, and optimization.

features.name: generative ai content generation
features.description: AI that generates email copy, subject lines, and content for campaigns.

features.name: marketing automations
features.description: Triggered workflows and drip sequences based on audience behavior and events.

features.name: enhanced automations
features.description: Advanced automation logic and branching available on higher-tier plans.

features.name: content creation tools
features.description: Built-in tools for designing and editing email and marketing content.

features.name: email templates
features.description: Pre-built and customizable email templates for campaigns.

features.name: custom-coded email templates
features.description: Ability to write and use HTML/CSS custom-coded email templates.

features.name: social media marketing
features.description: Tools to create and manage social media posts and ads alongside email campaigns.

features.name: reporting and analytics
features.description: Campaign performance dashboards measuring opens, clicks, revenue, and ROI.

features.name: audience growth insights
features.description: Actionable insights into audience growth trends and list health.

features.name: conversion funnel analytics
features.description: Visibility into audience conversion funnels from sign-up to purchase.

features.name: lead generation platform
features.description: Tools to capture, grow, and manage leads and subscriber lists.

features.name: customizable popup forms
features.description: Popup sign-up forms that can be customized for lead capture on websites.

features.name: audience management
features.description: Segmentation, tagging, and management of subscriber lists and audience data.

features.name: real-time behavioral data
features.description: Tracking and use of subscriber behavioral data to personalize and trigger campaigns.

features.name: transactional email
features.description: Triggered transactional emails (order confirmations, receipts) via separate API.

features.name: marketing api
features.description: REST API for programmatic list management, campaign creation, and data access.

features.name: transactional api
features.description: Dedicated API (Mandrill) for sending transactional and triggered emails at scale.

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Webhooks for real-time event notifications to external systems.

features.name: personalized onboarding
features.description: Guided onboarding sessions with Mailchimp specialists to get accounts configured.

features.name: customer success
features.description: Dedicated customer success support for ongoing account management.

features.name: hire an expert marketplace
features.description: Directory of certified Mailchimp experts and agencies available for hire.

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Mobile application for managing campaigns and monitoring performance on the go.

features.name: multi-language support
features.description: Platform UI available in English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, German, and Italian.

features.name: gdpr compliance tools
features.description: Built-in GDPR compliance features for consent management and data handling.

features.name: integrations directory
features.description: 300+ third-party app integrations accessible via a curated marketplace.

differentiators: #1 AI-powered email marketing and automations platform (self-claimed, based on 24,900+ reviews)
Up to 24x ROI claimed for Standard plan customers
All-in-one platform combining email, SMS, social, automations, and analytics
300+ integrations covering the full e-commerce and marketing tech stack
AI-native features embedded across campaign creation, segmentation, and optimization
Real-time behavioral data powering always-on automations

pricing_signal.free_tier: Basic free plan available; Standard plan offers 14-day free trial with up to 6,000 emails/month and no credit card required
